methodology.subheadline: Each letter defines a pillar of our methodology. These are not fancy words, they are the real steps we use to build brands that grow.

about_page.meta_title: About Us | The Monkeys - Creative Agency in Santiago, Dominican Republic
about_page.meta_description: We are Giovanny and Guillermo, founders of The Monkeys. Over 10 years in strategic marketing and 15 in audiovisual production. A creative agency in Santiago, DR, built to do marketing with direction and real results.
about_page.hero_subtitle: We are not just another agency. We are two professionals who decided to do marketing differently — with
about_page.hero_subtitle_end: from Santiago for the entire country.
about_page.history_body1: The Monkeys is born from a real complementation between two professionals: one masters strategy, digital and planning. The other transforms ideas into high-impact visual pieces. Together, we build an agency that does marketing with purpose.
about_page.history_body2: We don't believe in marketing by inertia. Every brand deserves a clear direction, a strategy that generates measurable impact and coherent execution from start to finish. We analyze before creating, we define before executing.
about_page.history_body3: We were born in Santiago de los Caballeros with a clear mission: to change how marketing is done in the Dominican Republic. We integrate strategy, content, production and campaigns in one team —
about_page.history_body3_bold: without depending on third parties, without friction, with real results.
about_page.team_subtitle: Each in their area, always aligned. That is how The Monkeys can offer a 360 service without depending on anyone else.

giovanny.name: Giovanny Fernandez
giovanny.bio1: Marketing professional with over 10 years of experience building brands and digital strategies. Specialized in branding, advertising campaigns and communication manuals.
giovanny.bio2: Giovanny leads the strategic and digital side: organizes projects, works directly with clients and ensures every action has a clear direction and measurable purpose.

guillermo.name: Guillermo Hernandez
guillermo.bio1: Photography and video professional with over 15 years of experience. Trained in Colombia, specialized in food photography and is a National Photography Award winner.
guillermo.bio2: Guillermo takes ideas from strategic to visual: creates each piece with the quality, precision and aesthetics that each brand needs to project.

team.title: Everything in one team
team.description: Strategy, content, photography, video, web and campaigns under one roof. No subcontracts, no friction, no loss of coherence.

investment.title: Investment that yields more
investment.description: By not depending on third parties, we offer competitive rates without sacrificing quality. Every dollar invested has a clear purpose.

transparency.title: Transparency every step
transparency.description: You will see what we do, how we do it and what it is generating for your business. No runarounds, with direct and constant communication.

allies.title: Allies, not just vendors
allies.description: We commit to the growth of your brand as if it were our own. The result is shared.

about_page.why_quote: We give more than we offer, always.
about_page.why_quote_body: Many businesses have potential but lack direction. They don't know what they need, how to communicate it or how to execute actions that truly drive their growth. That's where we come in: to organize, structure and build with intention.
about_page.cta_subtitle: Tell us about your business and what you need to achieve. No commitments, no runarounds.

contact_page.faq_subtitle: These are the questions we get asked the most before starting. If yours isn't here, write to us directly.

q1.question: Do you work with brands in any industry?
q1.answer: Yes. Our MONKEYS methodology adapts to any type of business or brand. We have worked with local, national and international brands across different sectors.

q2.question: How long does it take to see results?
q2.answer: It depends on the service. Digital campaigns generate results from the first week. SEO and organic positioning take between 3 and 6 months. The important thing is that every action has a purpose and clear follow-up.

q3.question: What if I don't know what I need?
q3.answer: That's exactly what we're here for. Tell us about your brand and your goals, we'll do the diagnosis and propose what you really need, without selling you more than necessary.

q4.question: Can you handle all of my brand's marketing?
q4.answer: Yes. That's our differentiator. We have everything in-house: strategy, content, visual production, digital campaigns, SEO and web development. No outsourcing, no friction.

q5.question: Do you work with brands that are just starting?
q5.answer: Absolutely. Accompanying brands from their launch is something we're passionate about. We can help you define your identity, strategy and communicate correctly from day one.

q6.question: What are your prices like?
q6.answer: Each proposal is customized according to the project scope. By not outsourcing, our prices are more affordable than hiring multiple people or agencies separately. Contact us and we'll prepare a tailored proposal.
